description: Run buck2 build root//... from the FUSE mount using macFUSE's FSKit backend (instead of FUSE-T NFS). Compare with metrics: (1) total build time vs native ~1min, (2) FUSE callback metrics (getattr calls, readdir time, etc.), (3) overall overhead ratio. The hypothesis: FSKit eliminates the NFS round-trip overhead that accounts for 8x slowdown. Success criteria: overhead under 2x of native build time.
title: Benchmark macFUSE FSKit vs FUSE-T NFS performance
